title: durabaculum samoense
intro: Durabaculum samoense, also known as the Samoan dodonaea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It has been used in traditional Samoan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. Durabaculum samoense can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
